title: notopleura angustissima
intro: Notopleura angustissima, also known as the narrow-leaved Notopleura or Aje, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, particularly in the countries of Colombia, Brazil, and Peru. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimalarial, and antiparasitic effects. The plant's extracts have been known to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and exhibiting potential antiviral properties. Notopleura angustissima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
